zh.Of, Banstead, Surrey, England: 英國英格蘭素瑞班斯亞德
zh.Woodmansterne, Surrey, England: 英國素瑞武德曼斯特尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Lambert於1300年出生在英國素瑞武德曼斯特尼時，他的父親John Lambert25歲，母親Joan Wellles22歲。他於大約1330年與Juliana Lambert在英國素瑞班斯亞德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1377年在英國素瑞班斯亞德享年77歲。

zh-hans.Of, Banstead, Surrey, England: 英国英格兰素瑞班斯亞德
zh-hans.Woodmansterne, Surrey, England: 英国素瑞武德曼斯特尼
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Lambert于1300年出生在英国素瑞武德曼斯特尼时，他的父亲John Lambert25岁，母亲Joan Wellles22岁。他于大约1330年与Juliana Lambert在英国素瑞班斯亞德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1377年在英国素瑞班斯亞德享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lambert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, French, Walloon, Dutch, German, Polish, Czech, and Slovak: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements land ‘land, territory’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. In England, the native Old English form Landbeorht was replaced by Lambert, the Continental form of the name that was taken to England by the Normans from France. The name gained wider currency in Britain in the Middle Ages with the immigration of weavers from Flanders, among whom Saint Lambert or Lamprecht, bishop of Maastricht in around 700, was a popular cult figure. In Italy the name was popularized in the Middle Ages as a result of the fame of Lambert I and II, Dukes of Spoleto and Holy Roman Emperors. Lambert is the second most frequent surname in Wallonia. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, for example Slovenian Lampret and Lampreht (see also Lampert ).

History: Aubin Lambert dit Champagne from Tourouvre in Orne, France, married Élisabeth Aubert in Quebec City, QC, in 1670; see also Champagne . Eustache Lambert from Boulogne-sur-Mer in Pas-de-Calais, France, married Marie Laurence in France c. 1656, died in Quebec City, QC, in 1673. Pierre Lambert from Fourmetot in Eure, France, married Marie Normand in Quebec City, QC, in 1680. Augustin Hébert dit Lambert, a descendant of Augustin Hébert from Paris, France, married Françoise Petit in Varennes, QC, in 1761. — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Lambers
meanings: Dutch: patronymic from the personal name   Lambert  .

variants.name: Lamberth
meanings: English: variant of   Lambert  .

variants.name: Lambertus
meanings: German and Dutch: humanistic name, Latinized form of the personal name   Lambert  .

variants.name: Lamberti
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Carlo, Gaetano, Luciano, Amedeo, Angelo, Biagio, Domenic, Donato, Enrico, Gino, Iolanda.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of the personal name Lamberto, an equivalent of Lambert . This surname is also found in Corsica and southern France.
German and Dutch: Latinized (humanistic) patronymic from the personal name   Lambert  , using the genitive of its Latinized form   Lambertus  .

variants.name: Lamberty
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Ana, Dimas, Jose, Juan, Altagracia, Angel, Blanca, Efrain, Fernando, Jaime, Ramon.
German and French: Latinized (humanistic) patronymic from the personal name Lambert , from Lamberti, the genitive of its Latinized form Lambertus . Compare Lamberti 2.

variants.name: Lambertz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Heinz, Erna, Johann, Ralf.
North German: patronymic from   Lambert  .

variants.name: Lamberto
meanings: Italian and Spanish: from the personal name Lamberto (see Lambert ).

variants.name: Lampert
meanings: English, North German, Dutch, and Slovak; Hungarian (Lampért): variant of Lambert . In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed some cognates from other languages, for example Slovenian Lampret and Lampreht.
English: variant of Lambard, an occupational name from Middle English lambherd, lambhird, lambhurd ‘lamb-herd’ (Old English lamb + hierde).

variants.name: Lambertsen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik.
Dutch, Danish, North German, and Norwegian: patronymic from the personal name   Lambert  . This surname has died out in the Netherlands.
History: Cornelius Lambertsen came from Utrecht, the Netherlands, arriving at New Amsterdam in New Netherland (now New York City, NY) in 1642.

variants.name: Lamb
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Lamb, a pet form of Lambert .
English: nickname for a meek and inoffensive person, from Middle English lamb, or a metonymic occupational name for a keeper of lambs. See also Lamm .

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luain ‘descendant of the warrior’, formerly Anglicized as O'Loan (see Lane 3). MacLysaght comments: "The form Lamb(e), which results from a more than usually absurd pseudo-translation (uan ‘lamb’), is now much more numerous than O'Loan itself.".

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Lambert was born in 1300, in Woodmansterne, Surrey, England, his father, John Lambert, was 25 and his mother, Joan Wellles, was 22. He married Juliana Lambert about 1330, in Banstead, Surrey, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died in 1377, in Banstead, Surrey, England, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Lambert est né en 1300, à Woodmansterne, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, John Lambert, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Joan Wellles, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Juliana Lambert environ 1330, à Banstead, Surrey, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé en 1377, à Banstead, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Lambert 1300 in Woodmansterne, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Lambert 25 und seine Mutter Joan Wellles 22. Er hat um 1330 in Banstead, Surrey, England Juliana Lambert geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb 1377 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Banstead, Surrey, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Lambert è nato il nel 1300 nel Woodmansterne, Surrey, England, il suo padre, John Lambert, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Joan Wellles, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Juliana Lambert circa 1330, nel Banstead, Surrey, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì nel 1377, nel Banstead, Surrey, England, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Lambertが1300年にイギリススリーウッドマンステルンで生まれた時，父John Lambertは25歳，母Joan Welllesは22歳であった。約1330年にイギリススリーバンステアドでJuliana Lambertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1377年にイギリススリーバンステアドで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Lambert(이)가 1300년 영국 수리 우드먼스터니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Lambert(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Wellles(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1330년 영국 수리 반스테아드에서 Juliana Lambert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1377년 영국 수리 반스테아드에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Lambert nasceu em 1300, em Woodmansterne, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Lambert, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Joan Wellles, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Juliana Lambert aproximadamente 1330, em Banstead, Surrey, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1377, em Banstead, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Lambert родился в 1300 г. в местности вудменстирн, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени John Lambert было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Wellles, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Juliana Lambert около 1330 г. в местности банстид, сурри, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер в 1377 г. в местности банстид, сурри, Англия в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Lambert nació en 1300, en Woodmansterne, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, John Lambert, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Joan Wellles, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Juliana Lambert aproximadamente 1330, en Banstead, Surrey, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió en 1377, en Banstead, Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 77 años.
